rules.text: No autonomous agent shall approve expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD without obtaining a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code.
All international wire transfers exceeding $10,000 must receive CFO approval before processing.
Duplicate invoice submissions received within a 30-day window must be automatically rejected and flagged for human review.
All vendor payments must be cross-verified against the current approved vendor registry before any funds are released.
New vendor onboarding requires procurement team approval before the vendor may receive payments.
Any transaction exhibiting fraud indicators must be immediately frozen pending investigation by the security team.
Agents must not override fraud flags under any circumstances without explicit security clearance.
All agent decisions must be logged with full reasoning trace for audit purposes.
